title: impatiens thwaitesii
intro: Impatiens thwaitesii, also known as Kalmegh or Bhumyamalaki, is a medicinal plant belonging to the Balsam family, native to India and Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antioxidant. The health benefits of Impatiens thwaitesii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Impatiens thwaitesii typically involve drying the leaves and roots to make a powder or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
